channel.title: INfinance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INfinance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Crypto caution weighs on Robinhood’s sales and sinks its stock
item.description: Shares of Robinhood fell in after-hours trade on Tuesday, after caution on crypto trading weighed on the trading app’s fourth-quarter sales and the co...

item.title: Why stocks have climbed even after the appearance of three Hindenburg Omens
item.description: The dreaded bear-market predictor isn’t so ominous, after all.

item.title: Lyft offers $1 billion buyback, but stock is tumbling after mixed results and outlook
item.description: CEO says Lyft will put more autonomous vehicles on the streets this year as it tries to keep up with Uber against a shaky ride-hailing and delivery ba...

item.title: Ford’s rosier outlook for the year sends stock higher after earnings
item.description: Ford Motor’s 2026 outlook gave Wall Street hope for the carmaker and trumped mixed quarterly earnings.

item.title: The S&P 500 just accomplished a first-time feat — and it suggests more wild swings ahead
item.description: The start to 2026 has brought no shortage of historic developments in global markets. Investors just witnessed another one over the past week.

item.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
item.description: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

item.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
item.description: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

item.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

item.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
item.description: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on ...

item.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
item.description: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia...
